ground_equipment.name: Personal Shield Module
ground_equipment.description: Generates a localized energy barrier. Absorbs the first hit taken and grants +2 HP.

ground_equipment.name: Noise Dampener
ground_equipment.description: Acoustic suppression field that reduces noise from all movement and actions.

ground_equipment.name: Vision Enhancer
ground_equipment.description: Thermal-optical overlay that extends visual range through walls and around corners.

ground_equipment.name: Lockpick Set
ground_equipment.description: Precision tools for bypassing electronic locks. Opens locked doors silently.

ground_equipment.name: EMP Grenade
ground_equipment.description: Electromagnetic pulse device. Disables one automated enemy for 5 turns.

ground_equipment.name: Thermal Visor
ground_equipment.description: Forge-calibrated thermal-optical overlay with crystal resonance filters. Extended vision range with passive noise suppression.

ground_equipment.name: Breaching Charge
ground_equipment.description: Shaped plasma charge with integrated EMP emitter. Blows open locked doors and briefly disables nearby electronics.

ground_equipment.name: Adrenal Compound Injector
ground_equipment.description: Illegal stimulant cocktail. Grants a burst of speed and combat focus, but the crash hits hard.

ground_equipment.name: EMP Grenade Pack
ground_equipment.description: Compact electromagnetic pulse devices. Disables electronics in the blast radius and stuns automated targets.

ground_equipment.name: Deep-Scan Probe
ground_equipment.description: Single-use mineral survey probe. Reveals hidden caches and resources within a wide radius during ground operations.
